name: truvera-mcp-servers
description: Monorepo of MCP servers for Truvera integrations

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp-shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/truvera-api
scripts.docker:build:api: docker build --build-arg BUILD_NUMBER="$(cat apps/truvera-api/.buildnumber)" -t docknetwork/truvera-api-mcp:latest -t docknetwork/truvera-api-mcp:$(cat apps/truvera-api/.buildnumber) -f apps/truvera-api/Dockerfile .
scripts.docker:run:api: docker rm -f truvera-api-mcp || true && docker run -d --name truvera-api-mcp --env-file apps/truvera-api/.env -e MCP_MODE=http -e MCP_PORT=3000 -p 3000:3000 docknetwork/truvera-api-mcp:latest
